zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah de Thornhill於大約1210年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親John de Thornhill31歲，母親Olivia Mare19歲。她和Henry Tankersley至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.Tankersley, Yorkshire West Riding, Engla: 英国英格兰越可爾坦可斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah de Thornhill于大约1210年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲John de Thornhill31岁，母亲Olivia Mare19岁。她和Henry Tankersley至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah de Thornhill was born about 1210, in Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Thornhill, was 31 and her mother, Olivia Mare, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Henry Tankersley.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah de Thornhill est née environ 1210, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Thornhill, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Olivia Mare, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Henry Tankersley.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah de Thornhill um 1210 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Thornhill 31 und ihre Mutter Olivia Mare 19. Sie hatte mit Henry Tankersley mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah de Thornhill è nata il circa 1210 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Thornhill, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Olivia Mare, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Henry Tankersley.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah de Thornhillが約1210年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Thornhillは31歳，母Olivia Mareは19歳であった。彼女はHenry Tankersleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah de Thornhill(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Thornhill(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Olivia Mare(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Henry Tankersley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah de Thornhill nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Thornhill, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Olivia Mare, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Henry Tankersley.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah de Thornhill родилась около 1210 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Thornhill было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Olivia Mare, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Henry Tankersley.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah de Thornhill nació aproximadamente 1210, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Thornhill, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Olivia Mare, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Henry Tankersley.
